description: Complete frontend UI overhaul - Particle system redesign (broken torus waveform), HUD labels, typing indicator, connection status panel, settings page, and dashboard layout improvements
steps: PARTICLE SYSTEM REDESIGN - Update frontend/components/entity/ParticleSystem.tsx: Increase PARTICLE_COUNT to 6000. Change the position generation to create a torus/ring shape: for each particle, compute angle theta = (i / PARTICLE_COUNT) * 2*PI * tubeWindings, and phi = (i / PARTICLE_COUNT) * 2*PI. Base torus: majorRadius=2.0, tubeRadius=0.3. Add waveform distortion: tubeRadius += sin(theta*5)*0.15 + sin(theta*13)*0.08 + sin(theta*7)*0.1 to create the broken-sphere look. Add small random jitter (0.05). Store the angle 'theta' in the phases array for color gradient. Keep existing uniforms and mouse/audio logic.

VERTEX SHADER REDESIGN - Rewrite frontend/components/entity/shaders/vertex.glsl: Keep all existing uniforms and attributes. Change the idle animation to use undulation: displace particles along their torus normal direction using sin waves that evolve with uTime. For audio reactivity, increase the displacement amplitude dramatically (multiply by uAudioBass * 2.0 and uAudioFrequency * 1.5). Mouse interaction should be REPULSION not attraction: compute direction from mouse to particle, apply force that pushes particles AWAY when within a distance threshold (smoothstep from 2.0 to 0.0). Add breathing: subtle radius pulsing with sin(uTime * 0.8). Set gl_PointSize to (2.0 + aRandom * 1.5 + uAudioBass * 2.0) * (250.0 / -mvPosition.z) for smaller, sharper particles. Color: use aPhase (which stores the angle around torus) to create gradient from vec3(1.0, 0.0, 0.8) (magenta) to vec3(0.0, 0.9, 1.0) (cyan) using mix based on aPhase.

FRAGMENT SHADER REDESIGN - Rewrite frontend/components/entity/shaders/fragment.glsl: Make particles sharper and smaller. Use a tighter falloff: float dist = length(gl_PointCoord - 0.5); discard if dist > 0.45. Use sharp core: float intensity = smoothstep(0.45, 0.1, dist). Reduce the blur/glow. Keep additive blending support. The final color should be vColor * intensity with minimal white core (just 0.1 * core brightness).

BACKGROUND PARTICLES - Add a new component frontend/components/entity/BackgroundParticles.tsx: Create a separate <points> mesh with ~500 sparse particles distributed randomly in a large volume (radius 8-15). These move very slowly (drift). Use simple white/cyan color at very low opacity (0.1-0.2). Small point size (1-2px). Include in EntityCanvas.tsx alongside the main ParticleSystem.

ENTITY CANVAS UPDATE - Update frontend/components/entity/EntityCanvas.tsx: Import and render BackgroundParticles alongside ParticleSystem. Set Canvas background to transparent (already is). Adjust camera position if needed (position [0, 0, 6] for better torus framing).

HUD LABELS - Create frontend/components/entity/HudLabels.tsx: A React component (NOT inside Canvas) that overlays absolute-positioned text labels on the entity area. Top-left: 'AI AUDIO FEEDBACK: ACTIVE PULSING' (or IDLE). Top-right: 'PARTICLE CORE: Broken Circularity'. Bottom center: 'DEVELOPER VIEW: Three.js Particle Swarm (GLSL Modulated by Real-time Voice Data)'. Style: font-mono text-[10px] tracking-wider uppercase opacity-40 text-white/60 with subtle border border-white/5 px-2 py-1 backdrop-blur-sm bg-white/[0.02]. Accept an 'isActive' prop to toggle between ACTIVE PULSING/IDLE.

TYPING INDICATOR - Update frontend/components/chat/ChatPanel.tsx: Add 'isTyping' state (boolean) and 'activeAgent' state (string). Set isTyping=true when sending a message, set it false when receiving a response in the ws.on('message') handler. Extract agent name from response data.agent and set activeAgent. Show a typing indicator below the last message when isTyping is true: three animated dots with text like 'scheduler is thinking...' or 'ChronAI is thinking...' using the activeAgent state. Add CSS animation for the dots (use a TypingIndicator sub-component or inline).

CONNECTION STATUS BAR - Add a status/activity bar at the top of ChatPanel.tsx (inside the header area, below the existing header): Show connected services as small badges: 'Google Calendar checkmark', 'Google Tasks checkmark', 'Gmail checkmark'. Show currently active agent if isTyping is true. Style: text-[10px] font-mono, green dot for connected services, subtle separator.

SETTINGS PAGE - Create frontend/app/settings/page.tsx: A full settings page with: 1) User profile section (name, email, avatar from session), 2) Connected Services section showing Google Calendar/Tasks/Gmail with green 'Connected' badges, 3) Preferences section with working hours (start/end time inputs), notification preferences (toggles for gentle/urgent/critical), theme (dark only, grayed out). Style with the dark theme. Add a back button/link to /dashboard at the top. Mark this as a protected page (wrap with session check or add to middleware matcher).

DASHBOARD LAYOUT - Update frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx: Add a top navigation bar with: ChronAI text logo (left), user avatar circle (top-right, from session), settings gear icon (links to /settings). The entity area should be flex-1 with the HudLabels overlay. Chat panel stays as 400px sidebar on right. Background: gradient from-[#0a0e1a] via-[#0f1629] to-[#0a0e1a]. Import and use HudLabels component overlaid on the entity area.

GLOBAL STYLES UPDATE - Update frontend/app/globals.css: Add the typing-dots keyframe animation. Ensure body background matches the deep navy gradient. Add utility classes for the HUD label styling if needed.
UPDATE MIDDLEWARE - Update frontend/middleware.ts: Add '/settings' to the protected routes matcher so it also requires authentication.
TAILWIND CONFIG - Update frontend/tailwind.config.ts if needed: Add any new animation keyframes (typing-dots). Ensure the color palette includes the deep navy shades.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm build passes successfully with no TypeScript errors
ParticleSystem uses torus geometry with waveform distortion and 6000 particles
Vertex shader implements repulsion-based mouse interaction (not attraction)
Fragment shader produces sharp, distinct particles with minimal blur
BackgroundParticles.tsx exists and is rendered in EntityCanvas
HudLabels.tsx exists with the three specified text labels
ChatPanel has isTyping state, typing indicator with animated dots, and agent name display
Connection status badges appear in chat header
Settings page exists at frontend/app/settings/page.tsx with profile, services, and preferences sections
Dashboard has top nav bar with logo, avatar, and settings gear icon
Color gradient in vertex shader goes from magenta (1.0, 0.0, 0.8) to cyan (0.0, 0.9, 1.0)
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && pnpm build - must complete with exit code 0
Verify settings page exists: ls app/settings/page.tsx
findings: All 11 sub-tasks implemented successfully. Build passes with only img element lint warnings (not errors). Used inline shader strings for BackgroundParticles to avoid extra .glsl files. Settings page uses hardcoded connected status as specified. Typing indicator animation uses CSS @apply with custom keyframes in globals.css.
